title: Customer interview — Vantage Analytics
text:
# Interview: Vantage Analytics (Enterprise)
Date: 2026-04-23
Interviewer: UX Research

Q: What's your biggest frustration?
A: Honestly, Notifications. It slows the whole team down and there's no 'Usage-based billing tiers'.

Q: If we fixed one thing?
A: Give us 'Usage-based billing tiers'. We'd expand our seat count if you did.

Q: How does this compare to alternatives?
A: A competitor already offers this, which is why we're evaluating switching.
